tips_en: I recommend starting with the OpenComputer paper, as its focus on hard-coded, self-evolving programmatic verifiers establishes a foundational paradigm for trustworthy agent evaluation that complements the verifiable reward designs in the long-context RL work and the deterministic verification gates in AutoResearchClaw. Together, these three papers advance a unified theme: replacing LLM-as-judge with objective, automated verification across training, benchmarking, and autonomous research pipelines.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 OpenComputer 论文，它对硬编码、自进化程序验证器的关注为可信智能体评估奠定了范式基础，与长上下文 RL 中的可验证奖励设计以及 AutoResearchClaw 中的确定性验证门直接互补。这三篇论文共同推进了一个统一主题：在训练、基准测试和自主研究流程中以客观自动化验证取代 LLM-as-judge。
